description: Composition Navy blue check shirt made of cotton, that has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this check shirt from belmonte. The tiny checks adds interest to the shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or khakhis and leather slip-on shoes for a laidback vibe. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
